## Description

<!-- SECTION:DESCRIPTION:BEGIN -->
Source: 2026-05-19 morning briefing Q6 + Q9.

Matteo wants agents to draft four outreach messages tonight (2026-05-19) for his review before bed, so the threads ship before his Thursday 5/21 Spain departure. None of the four are done yet.

Targets:
1. TASK-118 — Nat Eliason reply re Austin/Alpha School visit (email).
2. TASK-121 — Will Bradley text re return-Austin / Prototown (text).
3. TASK-123 — Thomas Icard outreach (email, academic).
4. TASK-119 — Bern light follow-up post-Austin (text, share article).

Each agent should pull context from the existing task description + Gmail/iMessage history + Apple Contacts note, then drop the draft into the corresponding task as a comment or sub-section labeled 'Draft for review'. Matteo reviews and sends tonight.

## Why this matters

Q1: time-bound by Spain departure. Letting these slip means he carries unfinished outreach mentally for the trip, and the Nat Eliason reply (the Alpha School door) is the most relationship-load-bearing of the four.
